rationale: No conflict. Tax Code §11.13(b) governs residence homestead property tax exemptions; Educ. Code §38.056 governs licensing requirements for grant-funded health services. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects.
quote: Any service provided using grant funds awarded under this subchapter must be provided by an appropriate professional who is properly licensed, certified, or otherwise authorized under state law to provide the service.
_note: No conflict identified. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no bearing on Educ. Code §38.056, which concerns licensure of health care providers for grant-funded school services.
